name: stackra/gateway
purpose: Payment gateway configuration + webhook ledger — PaymentGatewayConfig, PaymentMethod, and GatewayWebhookEvent aggregates for provider connections.
capabilities: PaymentGatewayConfig (pgc_ prefix) — active per-tenant per-provider config
when_to_use: A tenant onboards a payment provider (Stripe / Paddle / Adyen) and needs configuration + webhook ingestion.
when_not_to_use: For payment intent + capture records, use stackra/payment. For refunds, use stackra/refund.
